description: An aerial photograph from an elevated viewpoint captures an expansive industrial port and coastal landscape under a clear sky. In the foreground, dry scrubland and a road with traffic are visible on a hillside. The middle ground is dominated by the port infrastructure, featuring multiple long piers extending into the sea. Along these piers, numerous yellow gantry cranes are prominent, overseeing vast areas densely packed with thousands of stacked, multi-coloured shipping containers. To the right of the container terminals, a large cluster of white, cylindrical storage tanks, likely for oil or chemicals, is visible, surrounded by associated industrial buildings and infrastructure. A highway runs along the edge of the industrial complex. The background shows the open sea with a long breakwater, a smaller pier, and a faint boat wake on the distant water. No text labels or specific geographic identifiers are visible.
